title: PVP Kills Recorded
query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS count FROM PVPKill WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate
detailQuery: SELECT Victim AS label, COUNT(*) AS value FROM PVPKill WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate GROUP BY Victim ORDER BY value DESC

details.text: {count} player ship(s) destroyed during the report period.
details.help: PVPKill.Victim is the destroyed commander's name. Inara links allow looking up the victim's profile.

tagLines: Player-versus-player engagement outcomes logged. The Pilots Federation notes the incidents without comment.
These weren't NPCs. Someone's evening got considerably worse.
Each name here is a pilot who met you in the void and didn't fly home.
